title: AI shopping hits a trust ceiling even as AI adoption rises
description:
Most consumers use AI to research products, but hesitation around payments shows a clear ceiling on how far AI commerce can go.
The post AI shopping hits a trust ceiling even as AI adoption rises appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI Shopping Hits Trust Ceiling Despite Rising Adoption
summary_ko: 소비자들이 제품 연구에 AI를 활용하고 있지만, 결제 과정에서는 여전히 신뢰 부족을 보이고 있다. 이는 AI 커머스가 직면한 명확한 한계점을 시사한다. 연구 단계와 실제 구매 결정 단계 간의 신뢰 격차가 존재한다.
summary_en: Consumers increasingly use AI for product research, but show clear hesitation when it comes to AI-assisted payments. This reveals a trust ceiling that limits the advancement of AI commerce capabilities. A significant gap exists between research-stage AI adoption and purchase-decision trust.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 커머스 도입 시 고객 신뢰 구축에 우선순위를 두고, 결제보다는 제품 추천 및 연구 지원에 초점을 맞춰야 한다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should prioritize trust-building when implementing AI commerce, focusing on product recommendations and research assistance rather than payment processes.
key_points: Consumers use AI for product research but hesitate at payment stage
Clear trust ceiling exists for AI commerce advancement
Gap between AI adoption for research vs. purchase decisions
one_line_insight_ko: AI 커머스의 성공은 기술 발전보다 소비자 신뢰 구축에 달려있다.
one_line_insight_en: AI commerce success depends more on building consumer trust than advancing technology capabilities.

title: [AINews] AI Engineer World's Fair — Autoresearch, Memory, World Models, Tokenmaxxing, Agentic Commerce, and Vertical AI Call for Speakers
description: a quiet day lets us make a call for speakers!
title_en: AI Engineer World's Fair Highlights Agentic Commerce and Vertical AI
summary_ko: AI 엔지니어 월드 페어에서 에이전틱 커머스와 수직 AI 분야에 대한 발표자를 모집하고 있다. 자동 연구, 메모리, 월드 모델, 토큰 최적화 등의 주제가 포함된다. AI 엔지니어링 커뮤니티의 최신 트렌드를 반영하는 행사이다.
summary_en: The AI Engineer World's Fair is calling for speakers on agentic commerce and vertical AI topics. The event covers autoresearch, memory, world models, and tokenization optimization themes. This reflects the latest trends in the AI engineering community.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 에이전틱 커머스 트렌드를 주시하고 관련 기술 개발에 투자해야 하며, AI 엔지니어링 커뮤니티와의 네트워킹을 강화해야 한다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should monitor agentic commerce trends, invest in related technology development, and strengthen networking with the AI engineering community.
key_points: Call for speakers on agentic commerce and vertical AI
Focus areas include autoresearch, memory, and world models
Reflects emerging trends in AI engineering community
one_line_insight_ko: 에이전틱 커머스가 AI 엔지니어링 커뮤니티의 핵심 관심사로 부상하고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Agentic commerce is emerging as a key focus area within the AI engineering community.

title: How TikTok Shop is winning over major brands
description: Platforms reporter Allison Smith joins the Modern Retail Podcast for a roundtable discussion on TikTok Shop's growth.
title_en: TikTok Shop Wins Over Major Brands with Commerce Innovation
summary_ko: 틱톡 샵이 주요 브랜드들을 성공적으로 유치하며 성장하고 있다. 플랫폼의 독특한 커머스 접근법이 브랜드들의 관심을 끌고 있다. 소셜 커머스 분야에서 틱톡 샵의 영향력이 확대되고 있다.
summary_en: TikTok Shop is successfully attracting major brands with its growing platform presence. The platform's unique commerce approach is gaining brand attention and investment. TikTok Shop's influence in social commerce is expanding significantly.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 틱톡 샵의 성공 요인을 분석하고 자체 소셜 커머스 전략을 수립해야 하며, 영상 기반 상품 판매 채널을 강화해야 한다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should analyze TikTok Shop's success factors, develop its own social commerce strategy, and strengthen video-based product sales channels.
key_points: TikTok Shop successfully attracting major brands
Unique commerce approach driving platform growth
Expanding influence in social commerce sector
one_line_insight_ko: 틱톡 샵의 성공은 소셜 커머스가 전통 이커머스를 위협하는 새로운 패러다임임을 보여준다.
one_line_insight_en: TikTok Shop's success demonstrates that social commerce is a new paradigm threatening traditional e-commerce.

title: Claire’s marks next chapter with Gen Alpha-focused ASMR campaign
description: “A Girl SMR at Claire's” includes ASMR filming set-ups, a Summer Sensory Shop and a presence on teen-focused social platform Coverstar.
title_en: Claire's Targets Gen Alpha with ASMR-Focused Marketing Campaign
summary_ko: 클레어스가 알파 세대를 타겟으로 한 ASMR 캠페인을 시작했다. 'A Girl SMR at Claire's'라는 캠페인은 ASMR 촬영 세트업과 여름 감각 매장을 포함한다. 틴 전용 소셜 플랫폼 커버스타에서도 활동한다.
summary_en: Claire's launched an ASMR campaign targeting Generation Alpha consumers. The 'A Girl SMR at Claire's' campaign includes ASMR filming setups and a Summer Sensory Shop. The brand also maintains a presence on teen-focused social platform Coverstar.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 신세대 소비자의 감각적 경험을 중시하는 트렌드를 주시하고, ASMR과 같은 새로운 마케팅 접근법을 실험해야 한다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should monitor trends emphasizing sensory experiences for new generation consumers and experiment with innovative marketing approaches like ASMR.
key_points: Claire's targets Generation Alpha with ASMR campaign
Campaign includes sensory shopping experiences and setups
Utilizes teen-focused social platform Coverstar
one_line_insight_ko: 알파 세대를 위한 마케팅은 시각적 콘텐츠를 넘어 감각적 경험으로 진화하고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketing to Generation Alpha is evolving beyond visual content to encompass sensory experiences.

title: Saks Global slashes 16% of its corporate workforce
description: The latest round of downsizing comes amid the luxury retailer’s bankruptcy and leaves it to focus resources “toward critical capabilities that will drive profitable, sustainable growth,” a spokesperson said Thursday.
title_en: Saks Global Cuts 16% of Corporate Workforce Amid Restructuring
summary_ko: 삭스 글로벌이 기업 인력의 16%를 감축했다. 이번 구조조정은 파산 상황에서 이루어졌으며 지속 가능한 수익성 성장을 위한 핵심 역량에 자원을 집중하기 위함이다. 럭셔리 리테일러의 최신 다운사이징 사례이다.
summary_en: Saks Global reduced its corporate workforce by 16% in latest restructuring efforts. The downsizing occurs amid bankruptcy proceedings and aims to focus resources on critical capabilities for sustainable growth. This represents the latest downsizing in the luxury retail sector.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 럭셔리 소매업계의 구조조정 트렌드를 모니터링하고, 효율성 개선과 핵심 역량 강화에 집중해야 한다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should monitor restructuring trends in luxury retail and focus on efficiency improvements and core capability strengthening.
key_points: Saks Global cuts 16% of corporate workforce
Restructuring amid bankruptcy proceedings
Focus on critical capabilities for sustainable growth
one_line_insight_ko: 럭셔리 리테일 업계의 구조조정이 가속화되며 효율성과 핵심 역량 중심으로 재편되고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Luxury retail restructuring is accelerating with focus on efficiency and core competency optimization.

title: Ace Hardware debuts Hey ARMA, its new AI assistant for in-store help
description:
Ace Hardware is putting artificial intelligence (AI) in the hands of its red-vested store associates. This means a customer question about which type of pipe works best for a project, or which mouse repellent would be most effective, can be instantly answered by an Ace associate with access to a new assistant. To make this […]
The post Ace Hardware debuts Hey ARMA, its new AI assistant for in-store help appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Ace Hardware Deploys AI Assistant 'Hey ARMA' to Support In-Store Associates
summary_ko: 에이스 하드웨어가 매장 직원들을 위한 AI 어시스턴트 'Hey ARMA'를 출시했습니다. 고객들의 제품 관련 질문을 직원들이 AI 도움을 받아 즉시 답변할 수 있게 됩니다. 이를 통해 매장 내 고객 서비스 품질이 크게 향상될 것으로 기대됩니다.
summary_en: Ace Hardware has launched an AI assistant called 'Hey ARMA' for its store associates. The system enables employees to instantly answer customer questions about products like pipes or pest control solutions with AI assistance. This technology aims to significantly improve in-store customer service quality.
so_what_ko: 매장 직원의 전문성을 AI로 보강하여 고객 경험을 향상시키는 사례로, LG D2C도 매장 운영에서 AI 어시스턴트를 활용해 고객 상담 품질을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: This demonstrates how AI can augment staff expertise to enhance customer experience, suggesting LG D2C could implement similar AI assistants to improve customer consultation quality in retail operations.
key_points: AI assistant deployed to support store associates in real-time customer service
Enables instant answers to product-specific customer questions
Focuses on enhancing in-store customer experience through AI augmentation
one_line_insight_ko: 매장 직원의 AI 보강을 통한 실시간 고객 서비스 혁신이 리테일 경쟁력의 새로운 차별화 요소가 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-augmented staff support is emerging as a new differentiation factor for retail competitiveness through real-time customer service innovation.

title: AEO prompt tracking for marketing teams
description: You already track and analyze your SEO strategy — keyword rankings, organic traffic, SERP positions. But when a prospect asks ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google AI Overviews a buying question and your brand doesn’t appear in the answer, traditional rank tracking can’t tell you that. AEO prompt tracking helps you measure brand visibility within AI-generated answers by monitoring whether (and how) your brand gets cited when real AI prompts are run across the engines your audience is actually using. For marketing leaders, SEO managers, and demand gen teams, it’s the measurement layer that closes the gap between “we publish great content” and “we can prove AI search drives pipeline.”
title_en: AEO Prompt Tracking Emerges as New Marketing Measurement for AI Search Era
summary_ko: AEO(AI Engine Optimization) 프롬프트 트래킹이 AI 검색 시대의 새로운 마케팅 측정 방법으로 등장했습니다. ChatGPT, Perplexity 등 AI 엔진의 답변에서 브랜드 노출도를 모니터링할 수 있습니다. 기존 SEO 추적으로는 측정할 수 없던 AI 생성 답변 내 브랜드 가시성을 분석합니다.
summary_en: AEO prompt tracking has emerged as a new marketing measurement method for the AI search era. It monitors brand visibility within AI-generated answers from engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity. This technology analyzes brand visibility in AI responses that traditional SEO tracking cannot measure.
so_what_ko: AI 검색 엔진에서의 브랜드 노출 측정이 새로운 마케팅 KPI가 되고 있어, LG는 AEO 최적화 전략을 통해 AI 환경에서의 브랜드 가시성을 확보해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Brand exposure measurement in AI search engines is becoming a new marketing KPI, requiring LG to develop AEO optimization strategies to secure brand visibility in AI environments.
key_points: New measurement method for brand visibility in AI-generated search results
Tracks citations across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
Closes the gap between content publishing and AI search pipeline attribution
one_line_insight_ko: AI 검색 시대에는 기존 SEO를 넘어 AI 엔진 답변 내 브랜드 노출 최적화가 마케팅의 핵심 경쟁력이 됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: In the AI search era, optimizing brand exposure within AI engine responses becomes the core marketing competitiveness beyond traditional SEO.

title: A new US phone network for Christians aims to block porn and gender-related content
description: A new US-wide cell phone network marketed to Christians is set to launch next week. It blocks porn, which experts in network security say marks the first time a US cell plan has used network-level blocking for such content that can’t be turned off even by adult account owners. It’s also rolling out a filter…
title_en: Christian-Focused Phone Network Launches with AI-Powered Content Filtering
summary_ko: 기독교도를 타겟으로 한 새로운 미국 휴대폰 네트워크가 출시됩니다. 네트워크 레벨에서 포르노 및 성별 관련 콘텐츠를 차단하는 기능을 제공합니다. 성인 계정 소유자도 해제할 수 없는 최초의 미국 휴대폰 서비스입니다.
summary_en: A new US phone network targeting Christians is launching with network-level content blocking. It filters pornographic and gender-related content that cannot be disabled even by adult account owners. This marks the first US cell plan to implement such comprehensive content filtering.
so_what_ko: 특정 가치관을 중심으로 한 니치 시장 타겟팅과 AI 기반 콘텐츠 필터링의 결합 사례로, LG도 특정 고객층의 가치관에 맞춘 맞춤형 서비스 개발을 고려할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: This case of combining niche market targeting based on specific values with AI-powered content filtering suggests LG could consider developing customized services aligned with specific customer segments' values.
key_points: First US network with non-disableable content filtering at network level
Targets specific demographic based on religious values
Uses AI-powered filtering technology for content control
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기반 콘텐츠 필터링을 통한 가치 기반 니치 시장 타겟팅이 새로운 차별화 전략으로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Value-based niche market targeting through AI-powered content filtering is emerging as a new differentiation strategy.

title: Ford CMO on bringing American values to life for nation’s 250th birthday
description: Global CMO Lisa Materazzo explains how the automaker is looking to shift the tone of the marketing world from big and loud to action oriented.
title_en: Ford CMO Emphasizes Action-Oriented Marketing for America's 250th Birthday
summary_ko: 포드의 글로벌 CMO가 미국 건국 250주년을 앞두고 미국적 가치를 마케팅에 구현하는 방법을 설명했습니다. 크고 시끄러운 마케팅에서 행동 지향적 마케팅으로의 톤 변화를 추진하고 있습니다. 실질적 가치 전달에 중점을 둔 마케팅 전략을 강조했습니다.
summary_en: Ford's Global CMO explained how to bring American values to life in marketing ahead of the nation's 250th birthday. The company is shifting from big and loud marketing to action-oriented approaches. The strategy emphasizes delivering substantial value through marketing communications.
so_what_ko: 브랜드 가치와 국가적 정체성을 연결한 스토리텔링 마케팅 사례로, LG도 각 지역의 문화적 가치와 브랜드를 연결하는 현지화된 마케팅 전략을 개발할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: This case of connecting brand values with national identity in storytelling marketing suggests LG could develop localized marketing strategies that connect the brand with cultural values in each region.
key_points: Shift from loud marketing to action-oriented approaches
Integration of national values with brand messaging
Focus on substantial value delivery over volume
one_line_insight_ko: 브랜드와 문화적 가치의 진정성 있는 연결이 소비자 공감을 이끌어내는 핵심 마케팅 전략이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Authentic connection between brand and cultural values is becoming a key marketing strategy for driving consumer resonance.

title: Why affiliate marketing still needs humans in the AI era
description:
As AI reshapes martech, affiliate programs highlight where human expertise still drives performance and results.
The post Why affiliate marketing still needs humans in the AI era appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Human Expertise Remains Critical in AI-Driven Affiliate Marketing Programs
summary_ko: AI가 마테크를 재편하는 가운데 제휴 마케팅에서는 여전히 인간의 전문성이 중요한 역할을 합니다. AI 기술이 발전해도 제휴 프로그램의 성과와 결과를 이끌어내는 데는 인간의 전문 지식이 필수적입니다. 마케팅 기술의 AI 혁신 속에서도 인간-AI 협업의 중요성이 강조되고 있습니다.
summary_en: While AI reshapes martech, human expertise remains crucial in affiliate marketing programs. Despite advancing AI technology, human knowledge is essential for driving performance and results in affiliate programs. The importance of human-AI collaboration is emphasized amid AI innovation in marketing technology.
so_what_ko: AI 마케팅 도구 도입 시에도 인간의 전문성과 판단력이 핵심 성과 동력임을 보여주어, LG는 AI 기술과 마케팅 전문가의 협업 모델을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: This demonstrates that human expertise and judgment remain key performance drivers even with AI marketing tools, requiring LG to build collaboration models between AI technology and marketing experts.
key_points: Human expertise critical for affiliate marketing performance despite AI advances
Emphasis on human-AI collaboration in marketing technology
Performance and results still require human judgment and knowledge
one_line_insight_ko: AI 마케팅 시대에도 인간의 전문성이 성과 창출의 핵심 요소로 남아 있어 AI-인간 협업 모델이 중요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Human expertise remains a core factor for performance creation even in the AI marketing era, making AI-human collaboration models essential.

title: Can DAMs keep up as content demands outgrow workflows?
description:
New MarTech research shows that as asset volume and personalization increase, DAMs' focus must shift to content management at scale.
The post Can DAMs keep up as content demands outgrow workflows? appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Digital Asset Management Systems Struggle to Scale with Growing Content Personalization Demands
summary_ko: MarTech 연구에 따르면 디지털 자산과 개인화 콘텐츠 볼륨이 증가하면서 DAM 시스템의 역할이 변화하고 있습니다. 기존 워크플로우로는 급증하는 콘텐츠 수요를 감당하기 어려운 상황입니다. DAM은 대규모 콘텐츠 관리에 초점을 맞춘 새로운 접근 방식이 필요합니다.
summary_en: New MarTech research reveals that DAM systems are struggling to keep pace with increasing digital asset volumes and personalization demands. Traditional workflows are becoming inadequate for handling the surge in content requirements. DAMs need to shift their focus toward scalable content management solutions.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 개인화된 콘텐츠 대량 생성을 위해 AI 기반 DAM 솔루션 도입을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must evaluate AI-powered DAM solutions to handle massive personalized content generation at scale.
key_points: DAM systems struggling with increased asset volume and personalization
Traditional workflows inadequate for current content demands
Need for scalable content management approaches
one_line_insight_ko: 개인화 콘텐츠 폭증에 대응하려면 AI 기반 DAM 시스템으로의 전환이 필수적입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Transitioning to AI-powered DAM systems is essential to handle the explosion in personalized content demands.

title: Why we trust AI when it makes things up
description:
As AI gets more fluent and human-like, our instincts to trust it are making catching hallucinations more difficult.
The post Why we trust AI when it makes things up appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Human Trust in AI Hallucinations Growing as Technology Becomes More Conversational
summary_ko: AI가 더욱 유창하고 인간적으로 발전하면서 사용자들이 AI의 허위 정보를 신뢰하는 경향이 증가하고 있습니다. 인간의 본능적 신뢰 성향이 AI 환각 현상을 탐지하는 것을 더욱 어렵게 만들고 있습니다. 이는 마케팅 분야에서 AI 활용 시 주의해야 할 중요한 이슈입니다.
summary_en: As AI becomes more fluent and human-like, users are increasingly trusting AI-generated misinformation and hallucinations. Human instincts to trust conversational AI are making it harder to detect false information. This presents significant challenges for marketing professionals using AI tools.
so_what_ko: D2C 마케터는 AI 도구 사용 시 팩트 체킹과 검증 프로세스를 강화하여 브랜드 신뢰도 손상을 방지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C marketers must strengthen fact-checking and verification processes when using AI tools to prevent brand credibility damage.
key_points: Increased human trust in AI-generated content as technology improves
Difficulty in detecting AI hallucinations due to conversational nature
Risk implications for marketing content accuracy
one_line_insight_ko: AI가 인간적일수록 허위정보 신뢰도 높아져 마케팅 검증 프로세스 강화가 시급합니다.
one_line_insight_en: As AI becomes more human-like, increased trust in misinformation makes strengthening marketing verification processes urgent.

title: AI Is Bringing Retail Media Closer to the Sale
description: This post was created in partnership with CVS Media Exchange Retail media has become a bigger part of the growth plan for many brands; it has also become harder to […]
title_en: AI Technology Advancing Retail Media Networks Closer to Point of Sale
summary_ko: AI 기술이 리테일 미디어를 실제 판매 시점에 더 가깝게 연결시키고 있습니다. 많은 브랜드들이 성장 전략의 일환으로 리테일 미디어를 확대하고 있지만 동시에 복잡성도 증가하고 있습니다. CVS Media Exchange와의 파트너십을 통해 이러한 변화가 구체적으로 논의되었습니다.
summary_en: AI technology is bringing retail media networks closer to the actual point of sale for enhanced targeting. Many brands are expanding retail media as part of their growth strategies, though complexity is also increasing. The discussion was explored through a partnership with CVS Media Exchange.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 기반 리테일 미디어 플랫폼을 활용하여 구매 시점 타겟팅 정확도를 높여야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should leverage AI-powered retail media platforms to improve point-of-sale targeting accuracy.
key_points: AI bringing retail media closer to point of sale
Growing importance of retail media in brand growth strategies
Increasing complexity in retail media execution
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기반 리테일 미디어로 구매 시점 타겟팅이 정교해져 전환율 향상 기회가 확대됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-powered retail media is creating opportunities for improved conversion through precise point-of-sale targeting.

title: For Creator-Led Campaigns, Authenticity Starts Before the Shoot
description: This post was created in partnership with Collectively Small business owners rarely get to do just one job. They handle marketing, finances, operations, customers, hiring, and whatever breaks before lunch. […]
title_en: Authentic Creator Campaigns Require Strategic Planning Before Production
summary_ko: 크리에이터 주도 캠페인에서 진정성은 촬영 전 기획 단계부터 시작되어야 합니다. 소규모 사업자들은 마케팅, 재무, 운영 등 여러 업무를 동시에 처리해야 하는 현실에 직면해 있습니다. Collectively와의 파트너십을 통해 이러한 도전과제가 다뤄졌습니다.
summary_en: Creator-led campaigns require authentic planning that begins well before the actual shoot or production phase. Small business owners face the challenge of handling multiple responsibilities including marketing, finances, operations, and customer service. This challenge was explored through a partnership with Collectively.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 크리에이터 파트너십에서 사전 기획 단계부터 브랜드 진정성을 확보하는 전략이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need strategies to ensure brand authenticity from the pre-planning stage of creator partnerships.
key_points: Authenticity in creator campaigns starts before production
Small business owners juggle multiple operational roles
Strategic planning essential for creator partnerships
one_line_insight_ko: 크리에이터 마케팅의 성공은 촬영 전 전략적 기획과 진정성 확보에 달려 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Success in creator marketing depends on strategic planning and authenticity building before production begins.

title: OpenAI starts laying foundations for ChatGPT ads in EU
description: Updates to the company's  conversion pixel signals a consent-first approach to ads in Europe,  shaped by stricter EU privacy rules.
title_en: OpenAI Prepares ChatGPT Advertising Infrastructure for European Union Launch
summary_ko: OpenAI가 유럽연합에서 ChatGPT 광고 서비스를 위한 기반 작업을 시작했습니다. 회사의 전환 픽셀 업데이트는 유럽의 엄격한 개인정보보호 규정에 맞춘 동의 우선 광고 접근 방식을 보여줍니다. 이는 EU 시장에서의 AI 기반 광고 플랫폼 확장을 의미합니다.
summary_en: OpenAI has begun laying the groundwork for ChatGPT advertising services in the European Union market. The company's conversion pixel updates signal a consent-first approach to advertising, shaped by stricter EU privacy regulations. This represents a significant expansion of AI-powered advertising platforms into the European market.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 ChatGPT 광고 플랫폼의 EU 진출에 대비하여 AI 대화형 광고 전략을 준비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prepare AI conversational advertising strategies for ChatGPT's advertising platform expansion into EU markets.
key_points: OpenAI developing ChatGPT advertising infrastructure for EU
Consent-first approach aligned with EU privacy regulations
Conversion pixel updates indicate preparation for ad launch
one_line_insight_ko: OpenAI의 EU 광고 진출로 대화형 AI 마케팅의 새로운 시대가 열릴 것으로 전망됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: OpenAI's EU advertising expansion signals the dawn of a new era in conversational AI marketing.
